validation_rules: select strategy before oracle labels or proof outcomes are visible
choose only from the public known_strategy_ids enum
attach retrieval-term additions as strategy hints only
reject proof, provider, or source body fields
reject oracle strategy labels and post-oracle selection
reject release, provider-call, proof-authority, and test-tuning overclaims
emit private-state scan and redacted receipts
receipt_expectations: receipt must cite source pattern ids, source refs, strategy ids, scored cases, selected strategy ids, miss classifiers, negative-case coverage, private-state scan, authority ceiling, and anti-claim
anti_claim: This standard governs public pre-oracle mathematical strategy metadata only. It does not run Lean/Lake, prove theorem correctness, reveal oracle strategy labels, expose proof bodies, call providers, tune on test answers, or authorize release.

standard_payload.ontology: A public-safe formal-math strategy atlas that maps problem feature tags to a known strategy enum before retrieval or proof execution.
standard_payload.teleology: Let Microcosm show that proof work is steered by explicit strategy hypotheses, not by hidden oracle labels or undifferentiated tactic search.
standard_payload.anti_purpose: Turning strategy selection into proof authority, oracle leakage, provider output, or release authority.
failure_modes: proof body rides alongside a strategy label
oracle strategy label is visible before scoring
strategy is selected after oracle feedback
strategy scoring claims release or proof authority

omission_receipt.reason: public tranche carries strategy metadata, synthetic feature fixtures, negative cases, and redacted receipts only

anti_claim_contract.rule: Strategy atlas material must state that it is not Lean/Lake execution, proof authority, oracle visibility, provider authority, test tuning, or release authority

source_coupling_contract.rule: macro source refs stay path-level metadata and public replacement refs stay public-root relative
